name: Tales from the Solstice
description: A sweeping 3-disc symphonic rock opera chronicling the harrowing 1996 abduction of Julian Rowlands and the auditory fortress his family built to guide him home. This definitive 10th-anniversary release finally reclaims the band's narrative from the corporate vaults, featuring the sacred, newly remastered Trilingual 'Family Mix' of the legendary beacon track, 'Upon This Winter's Night'.
